channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: US Authorities Move to Drop Fraud Charges Against Gautam Adani Amid Legal Settlement
item.description: The United States has decided to drop fraud charges against Gautam Adani, chairman of the Adani Group, following legal negotiations. The decision was reported shortly after news emerged that Adani's l...

item.title: United States Imposes Tariffs on Canadian Mushroom Exports Amid Trade Dispute
item.description: The United States has imposed countervailing duties on most fresh Canadian mushrooms following an investigation by the U.S. Department of Commerce. The preliminary duties, announced in the federal reg...

item.title: Trump DOJ Establishes $1.776 Billion Fund for Alleged Victims of Biden Administration, Raising Concerns About Corruption
item.description: Veteran CBS News anchor Dan Rather criticized President Donald Trump's latest initiative, in which $1.776 billion will be distributed to allies claiming to have been unfairly targeted by the Biden adm...

item.title: Macquarie Capital appoints internal candidate to lead private capital markets division
item.description: Macquarie Capital has appointed a familiar face to lead its private capital markets division, signalling continuity and internal experience in the Australian investment banking sector. The newly appoi...

item.title: Canadiens Defeat Sabres 3-2 in Game 7 Overtime, Advance to Eastern Conference Finals
item.description: The Montreal Canadiens have secured a thrilling victory over the Buffalo Sabres, winning 3-2 in overtime during Game 7 of the Eastern Conference semifinals. Cole Newhook was the hero of the night, sco...

item.title: Political Experts Criticize Trump's Influence on the Republican Party and Upcoming Elections
item.description: Political analysts and experts are raising concerns about former President Donald Trump's influence over the Republican Party as his MAGA movement continues to shape GOP priorities. David Rothkopf, a ...

item.title: AAP leader Deepak Singla arrested by ED in connection with money laundering probe
item.description: On Monday, the Enforcement Directorate (ED) arrested Deepak Singla, a leader of the Aam Aadmi Party (AAP), following searches at several locations linked to him and his associates. The action relates ...

item.title: King Charles attends Chelsea Flower Show and meets David Beckham
item.description: King Charles and Queen Camilla attended the 2026 Chelsea Flower Show, enjoying the unique atmosphere of the event. For only the second time, the Royal Horticultural Society allowed garden gnomes, and ...

item.title: Trump Issues Warning to Iran as Diplomatic Talks Stall
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has issued a stern warning to Iran, stating that time is running out for a potential deal. Speaking on his Truth Social platform, Trump emphasised that Iran must act quickl...

item.title: Trump Halts Iran Strike Temporarily as Peace Talks Progress
item.description: US President Donald Trump announced on May 18, 2026, that he had temporarily paused a planned military strike on Iran to allow ongoing negotiations to proceed after Tehran submitted a new peace propos...

item.title: PTI raises concerns over human rights of political detainees
item.description: During a Senate session on Monday, Pakistan Tehreek-e-Insaf (PTI) lawmakers highlighted serious concerns about the treatment of political detainees, specifically former Prime Minister Imran Khan and h...

item.title: Neymar Returns to Brazil Squad for 2026 World Cup After Nearly Three Years Out
item.description: On Monday, Brazil gaffer Carlo Ancelotti don confirm say superstar Neymar go dey back for the national team after almost three years wey e no dey play because of knee wahala. Neymar, wey be Brazil all...

item.title: Cardoso Confident Sundowns Can Handle Final in Rabat Despite Loftus VAR Issues
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns carry a narrow 1-0 lead into the second leg of the 2025-26 CAF Champions League final against AS FAR in Rabat, after a first leg at Loftus Stadium that was overshadowed by violence i...

item.title: CBS News Considers Reducing Bari Weiss's Role in TV Programming Amid Criticism
item.description: CBS News is reportedly considering a shift in leadership responsibilities as editor-in-chief Bari Weiss may be removed from overseeing the network's TV programming. Weiss, a Trump-aligned journalist, ...

item.title: A Comprehensive Guide to Retinol: Benefits and How to Use It
item.description: Retinol, a derivative of vitamin A, is widely celebrated in skincare for its versatility and effectiveness. While many know it for its anti-aging and acne-fighting properties, it also helps reduce sun...

item.title: Khawaja Asif warns India against future military misadventures, praises Pakistan's regional status
item.description: Defence Minister Khawaja Asif has issued a stern warning to India, stating that any future misadventure against Pakistan would have severe consequences, potentially altering India's geography and rele...

item.title: UK temperatures expected to rise over the bank holiday weekend
item.description: Parts of the United Kingdom are anticipating warmer weather as temperatures are forecast to rise ahead of the bank holiday weekend. Following an unusually cold spell last week, temperatures are expect...

item.title: FirstBank and Visa introduce Naira Visa Debit Card to boost electronic payments in Nigeria
item.description: First Bank of Nigeria, in collaboration with Visa, don launch the Naira Visa Debit Card to make electronic payments easy and accessible for Nigerians. This card go help ordinary people do their daily ...

item.title: Three killed in San Diego mosque attack, suspected teen shooters also dead
item.description: A tragic shooting occurred at the Islamic Center of San Diego, the largest mosque in San Diego County, resulting in the deaths of three people. Authorities later discovered the bodies of two suspected...

item.title: Kevin Gates’ Personal Life and Relationships Explained
item.description: Kevin Gates, the American rapper and entrepreneur, is one of hip-hop's most talked-about figures, known for his candid lyrics and eventful personal life. Despite online speculation, Gates has never co...
